Pricing

Three tiers. All free during testing.

Every new account starts on a 60-day Tier 3 trial — full features, no credit card. After the trial you choose any tier you like and keep going.

Tier 1 — Starter

For light, occasional analysis.

  • 50 MB max file size
  • 10,000 rows max
  • Auto-cleaning pipeline
  • Descriptive statistics
  • Visualisations
  • —
  • —

Tier 2 — Pro

For working analysts.

  • 200 MB max file size
  • 500,000 rows max
  • Everything in Tier 1
  • Predictive models
  • ML & K-Means clustering
  • —
  • —

Tier 3 — Studio

Default during your 60-day trial.

  • 200 MB max file size
  • 1,000,000 rows max
  • Everything in Tier 2
  • AI chat assistant
  • Export reports (PDF/HTML)
  • Cleaning recipes
  • Time-period comparison
Start Tier 3 trial →

Frequently asked questions

Is DataVision Pro really free right now?

Yes — all tiers are free during our public testing period. The only difference between tiers is feature access; there is no payment step today.

What happens after the 60-day trial?

Your account is downgraded to a free tier you choose; the platform asks you to contact us to keep Tier 3 access.

Will pricing change later?

When we move out of public testing we'll publish paid pricing here with at least 30 days' notice. Existing trial accounts will get a clear migration path.

Do you offer team accounts?

Team accounts are on the roadmap. Today every user has their own login and dataset library.

An intelligent data analytics platform that turns raw datasets into clear, actionable insights — in seconds, no code required.
